examples.sentence: この大学において、英語のクラスが一番人気があります。
examples.translation: In this university, English classes are the most popular.
examples.translationEn: In this university, English classes are the most popular
examples.romaji: Kono daigaku ni oite, eigo no kurasu ga ichiban ninki ga arimasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: In this university, English classes are the most popular

examples.sentence: 彼の研究において新しい発見がありました。
examples.translation: In his research, there were new discoveries.
examples.translationEn: In his research, there were new discoveries
examples.romaji: Kare no kenkyuu ni oite atarashii hakken ga arimashita.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: In his research, there were new discoveries

examples.sentence: 運動会において、彼は大活躍しました。
examples.translation: At the sports festival, he performed exceptionally well.

examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: At the sports festival, he performed exceptionally well

examples.sentence: 環境問題においては、みんなが責任を持って行動すべきです。
examples.translation: Regarding environmental issues, everyone should take responsibility and act accordingly.
examples.translationEn: Regarding environmental issues, everyone should take responsibility and act accordingly

examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: Regarding environmental issues, everyone should take responsibility and act accordingly

examples.sentence: 天気にかかわらず、今日の試合は行われます。
examples.translation: The game today will be held, regardless of the weather.
examples.translationEn: The game today will be held, regardless of the weather
examples.romaji: Tenki ni kakawarazu, kyou no shiai wa okonawaremasu.
examples.translationViDraft: Bản dịch ví dụ cần biên tập từ: The game today will be held, regardless of the weather

examples.sentence: 彼は年齢にかかわらず、新しいことを学び続けています。
examples.translation: He continues to learn new things, regardless of his age.
examples.translationEn: He continues to learn new things, regardless of his age
examples.romaji: Kare wa nenrei ni kakawarazu, atarashii koto wo manabi tsuzukete imasu.

examples.sentence: その仕事が難しいかどうかにかかわらず、彼女は努力し続けた。
examples.translation: Regardless of whether the job is difficult or not, she continued to make an effort.
examples.translationEn: Regardless of whether the job is difficult or not, she continued to make an effort
examples.romaji: Sono shigoto ga muzukashii ka dou ka ni kakawarazu, kanojo wa doryoku shi tsuzuketa.

examples.sentence: 経験の有無にかかわらず、このプログラムは誰でも利用できます。
examples.translation: Regardless of experience, this program can be used by anyone.

examples.sentence: 料理の腕前にかけては、彼女は誰にも負けません。
examples.translation: When it comes to cooking skills, she is second to none.
examples.translationEn: When it comes to cooking skills, she is second to none

examples.sentence: この町にかけては、彼の店が一番おいしいラーメンを売っています。
examples.translation: As far as this town is concerned, his store sells the most delicious ramen.
examples.translationEn: As far as this town is concerned, his store sells the most delicious ramen

examples.sentence: 音楽の知識にかけては、彼は私たちの中で一番詳しいです。

examples.sentence: 成長にしたがって、この植物の葉が大きくなります。
examples.translation: As it grows, the leaves of this plant become larger.

examples.translation: If I were the children, this story might be boring.

examples.sentence: 行くにしろ行かないにしろ、早く決めてください。

examples.sentence: このレストランが高いにしろ安いにしろ、料理は美味しいです。

examples.sentence: 彼と話すにつけ、彼が考えるにつけ、彼の知識に驚かされる。
